mapper.select:
select
DATE_FORMAT(mao.order_time, '%Y-%m') timeLabel
DATE_FORMAT(mao.order_time, '%x-W%v') timeLabel
, mao.product_id productId , mp.title productTitle , count(mao.id) totalOrderCount , sum(case when mao.order_state = 3 then 1 else 0 end) completedCount , sum(case when mao.order_state != 3 then 1 else 0 end) uncompletedCount , sum(case when mao.order_state = 3 and mao.is_evaluated = 0 then 1 else 0 end) unreviewedCount , coalesce(sum(mao.hire_money), 0) totalCommission , coalesce(sum(case when mao.hire_is_pay = 1 then mao.hire_money else 0 end), 0) paidCommission , coalesce(sum(case when mao.hire_is_pay = 0 then mao.hire_money else 0 end), 0) unpaidCommission , coalesce(sum(mao.seed_money), 0) totalSeedMoney , coalesce(sum(mao.way_bill_money), 0) totalWayBillMoney from brush_order mao left join platform_product mp on mao.product_id = mp.code where mao.order_time is not null
and mao.platform_type = #{platformType}
group by DATE_FORMAT(mao.order_time, '%Y-%m'), mao.product_id, mp.title order by timeLabel desc, totalOrderCount desc
group by DATE_FORMAT(mao.order_time, '%x-W%v'), mao.product_id, mp.title order by timeLabel desc, totalOrderCount desc
